_comment: Copy to ~/.config/k8s-infra-audit/config.json and edit. All fields optional — omit any you don't want to set.
cluster_context: One-paragraph description of the cluster: distribution (k3s/EKS/GKE/etc.), notable architecture, network model, secrets approach, backup mechanism. The audit puts this verbatim into the engagement report context section.

namespaces._comment: Either set 'include' to a list of namespace names / globs (e.g. 'app-*', 'platform'), OR leave include=null and use 'exclude' to subtract from the auto-discovered set.

manifest_roots: _comment: directories to search for source-of-truth YAML

scoring_weights._comment: Must sum to 1.0. Override to bias the overall maturity score.

critical_workloads._comment: PVC names (without namespace) that the audit should treat as critical for the Operational Resilience score. Missing backup of these = -25 points each. Default heuristic = any StatefulSet-backed PVC.

known_traps_to_check._comment: All true by default. Set to false to skip patterns that don't apply to your cluster.
